# Gene-gene consensus Jaccard

```{r gene-gene-clustering}
# ── CONFIG ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
TOP_N_GENES <- 400  # genes ranked by total union CCI count
GENE_GENE_TOP_VAR_CCI_PCT <- 0.05   # top X% CCIs by Gene×Dataset logFC variance (HVG)
GENE_GENE_MIN_OBS_PER_CCI <- 10      # min non-NA Gene×Dataset rows per CCI for HVG ranking
GENE_GENE_CANCER_FILTER_OPTIONS <- c("H&N") # c("All", "Breast", "Lung", "H&N")
for (GENE_GENE_CANCER_FILTER in GENE_GENE_CANCER_FILTER_OPTIONS) {
message("\n===== GENE_GENE_CANCER_FILTER: ", GENE_GENE_CANCER_FILTER, " =====")

# ── 1. Union CCI set per gene (restricted to included datasets) ───────────────
if (!GENE_GENE_CANCER_FILTER %in% c("All", "Breast", "Lung", "H&N"))
  stop("GENE_GENE_CANCER_FILTER must be one of: \"All\", \"Breast\", \"Lung\", \"H&N\"")
{
  included_cci_sets <- if (GENE_GENE_CANCER_FILTER == "All") {
    all_top_cci_sets
  } else {
    all_top_cci_sets[ds_cancer_map[names(all_top_cci_sets)] == GENE_GENE_CANCER_FILTER]
  }
}
message("Gene–Gene matrix using datasets (", GENE_GENE_CANCER_FILTER, "): ",
        paste(names(included_cci_sets), collapse = ", "))

# HVG CCIs from logFC space (same logic as post-analysis-hvg-ccis).
malignant_for_hvg <- setNames(
  lapply(names(included_cci_sets), function(ds) {
    obj_name <- paste0(ds, ".malignant")
    if (!exists(obj_name, inherits = TRUE)) {
      stop("Missing ", obj_name, " — required for gene–gene HVG CCI selection.")
    }
    get(obj_name, inherits = TRUE)
  }),
  names(included_cci_sets)
)
hvg_sel <- select_hvg_ccis(
  malignant_for_hvg,
  ds_cancer_map[names(malignant_for_hvg)],
  top_pct = GENE_GENE_TOP_VAR_CCI_PCT,
  min_obs = GENE_GENE_MIN_OBS_PER_CCI
)
gene_gene_hvg_ccis <- hvg_sel$hvg
message(sprintf(
  "Gene–gene HVG CCIs: %d / %d eligible (top %.0f%% by variance, cutoff = %.4f)",
  length(gene_gene_hvg_ccis), hvg_sel$n_eligible,
  GENE_GENE_TOP_VAR_CCI_PCT * 100, hvg_sel$var_cutoff
))

all_gene_names <- sort(unique(unlist(lapply(included_cci_sets, names))))
gene_cci_union <- setNames(
  lapply(all_gene_names, function(g) {
    unique(unlist(lapply(included_cci_sets, function(ds) ds[[g]])))
  }),
  all_gene_names
)
gene_cci_union <- lapply(gene_cci_union, restrict_ccis_to_hvg, hvg_ccis = gene_gene_hvg_ccis)
gene_cci_union <- Filter(function(x) length(x) > 0, gene_cci_union)
message("Genes with at least one HVG CCI (union): ", length(gene_cci_union))

# ── 2. Top N genes by union CCI count ─────────────────────────────────────────
cci_counts <- sapply(gene_cci_union, length)
top_genes  <- sort(names(sort(cci_counts, decreasing = TRUE))[
  seq_len(min(TOP_N_GENES, length(cci_counts)))])
gene_cci_top <- gene_cci_union[top_genes]
message("Top ", length(top_genes), " genes selected")

# ── 3. Gene × CCI binary matrix ───────────────────────────────────────────────
all_ccis_top <- unique(unlist(gene_cci_top))
gene_bin_mat <- do.call(rbind, lapply(gene_cci_top, function(v) as.integer(all_ccis_top %in% v)))
rownames(gene_bin_mat) <- top_genes
message("Gene binary matrix: ", nrow(gene_bin_mat), " × ", ncol(gene_bin_mat))

# ── 3b. Gene-level pairwise CCI intersection object ───────────────────────────
# Helper: return CCIs shared between any two top genes (union-across-datasets sets)
get_mutual_ccis_genes <- function(gene1, gene2) {
  s1 <- gene_cci_top[[gene1]]
  s2 <- gene_cci_top[[gene2]]
  if (is.null(s1) || is.null(s2)) stop("Gene not found. Available: ", paste(top_genes, collapse = ", "))
  intersect(s1, s2)
}

# Pairwise intersection table for all top-gene pairs (upper-triangle, long format)
{
  ng  <- length(top_genes)
  idx_g <- which(upper.tri(matrix(0, ng, ng)), arr.ind = TRUE)
  list_gene_pairwise_intersections <- tibble::tibble(
    GeneA        = top_genes[idx_g[, 1]],
    GeneB        = top_genes[idx_g[, 2]],
    mutual_ccis  = mapply(
      function(i, j) intersect(gene_cci_top[[top_genes[i]]], gene_cci_top[[top_genes[j]]]),
      idx_g[, 1], idx_g[, 2],
      SIMPLIFY = FALSE
    ),
    n_mutual     = sapply(
      seq_len(nrow(idx_g)),
      function(k) length(intersect(gene_cci_top[[top_genes[idx_g[k, 1]]]],
                                   gene_cci_top[[top_genes[idx_g[k, 2]]]]))
    )
  )
}
message("Gene pairwise intersection table: ", nrow(list_gene_pairwise_intersections), " pairs")

# ── 4. Consensus Jaccard distance (Gene × Gene) ───────────────────────────────
cross_g <- tcrossprod(gene_bin_mat)
rsums_g <- rowSums(gene_bin_mat)
union_g <- outer(rsums_g, rsums_g, "+") - cross_g
union_g[union_g == 0] <- NA_real_

gene_jac_dist <- 1 - cross_g / union_g
diag(gene_jac_dist) <- NA_real_
gene_jac_dist_clust <- gene_jac_dist
gene_jac_dist_clust[is.na(gene_jac_dist_clust)] <- 1
diag(gene_jac_dist_clust) <- 0
gene_jac_dist[is.na(gene_jac_dist) & row(gene_jac_dist) != col(gene_jac_dist)] <- 1

matrix_global_gene_distance <- gene_jac_dist

# ── 5. Heatmap ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
{
  disp_nums_jac <- matrix(sprintf("%.2f", gene_jac_dist),
                          nrow = nrow(gene_jac_dist), dimnames = dimnames(gene_jac_dist))
  diag(disp_nums_jac) <- ""
}
heatmap_args <- list(
  gene_jac_dist,
  color           = colorRampPalette(c("#4575b4", "#ffffbf", "#d73027"))(100),
  breaks          = seq(min(gene_jac_dist, na.rm = TRUE),
                        max(gene_jac_dist, na.rm = TRUE),
                        length.out = 101),
  na_col          = "grey80",
  cluster_rows    = TRUE,
  cluster_cols    = TRUE,
  # clustering_distance_rows = as.dist(gene_jac_dist_clust),
  # clustering_distance_cols = as.dist(gene_jac_dist_clust),
  #display_numbers = disp_nums_jac,
  #number_color    = "black",
  #fontsize_number = 8,
  fontsize_row    = max(4, 120 / length(top_genes)),
  fontsize_col    = max(4, 120 / length(top_genes)),
  angle_col       = "45",
  main            = sprintf(
    "Gene–Gene Jaccard Distance — HVG CCIs only (%s)",
    if (GENE_GENE_CANCER_FILTER == "All") "consensus across all datasets"
    else paste0(GENE_GENE_CANCER_FILTER, " datasets only"))
)

do.call(pheatmap, heatmap_args)

gene_heatmap_file <- file.path(OUTPUT_DIR,
  sprintf("gene_gene_jaccard_heatmap_%s.png", tolower(GENE_GENE_CANCER_FILTER)))
do.call(pheatmap, c(heatmap_args, list(filename = gene_heatmap_file,
                                       width    = 3000 / 300,
                                       height   = 3000 / 300)))
message("Heatmap saved to ", gene_heatmap_file)

# ── RBO: Gene × Gene distance matrix (same top genes, full ranked lists) ─────
# For each top gene, build a consensus ranked CCI list across included datasets:
# CCIs appearing in more datasets rank first; ties broken by mean rank position.
{
  included_cci_sets_ranked <- if (GENE_GENE_CANCER_FILTER == "All") {
    all_cci_sets_ranked
  } else {
    all_cci_sets_ranked[ds_cancer_map[names(all_cci_sets_ranked)] == GENE_GENE_CANCER_FILTER]
  }
}

gene_cci_consensus_ranked <- setNames(
  lapply(top_genes, function(g) {
    rank_data <- purrr::imap_dfr(included_cci_sets_ranked, function(ds_sets, ds_name) {
      cci_vec <- ds_sets[[g]]
      if (is.null(cci_vec) || length(cci_vec) == 0) return(NULL)
      data.frame(CCI = cci_vec, rank_pos = seq_along(cci_vec), stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
    })
    if (nrow(rank_data) == 0) return(character(0))
    rank_data %>%
      group_by(CCI) %>%
      summarise(n_datasets = n(), mean_rank = mean(rank_pos), .groups = "drop") %>%
      arrange(desc(n_datasets), mean_rank) %>%
      pull(CCI) %>%
      restrict_ccis_to_hvg(gene_gene_hvg_ccis)
  }),
  top_genes
)


# ── AO: Gene × Gene distance matrix (same top genes, full ranked lists) ──────
message("Computing gene–gene Average Overlap distances for ", length(top_genes), " genes...")
ng <- length(top_genes)
gene_ao_dist <- matrix(0, nrow = ng, ncol = ng,
                       dimnames = list(top_genes, top_genes))
for (i in seq_len(ng - 1)) {
  for (j in (i + 1):ng) {
    d <- dist_fun_superranker_overlap(gene_cci_consensus_ranked[[top_genes[i]]],
                                     gene_cci_consensus_ranked[[top_genes[j]]])
    gene_ao_dist[i, j] <- d
    gene_ao_dist[j, i] <- d
  }
}
gene_ao_dist_clust <- gene_ao_dist
gene_ao_dist_clust[is.na(gene_ao_dist_clust)] <- 1
diag(gene_ao_dist) <- NA_real_
matrix_global_gene_ao_distance <- gene_ao_dist
message("Gene–gene AO matrix complete.")

{
  disp_nums_ao <- matrix(sprintf("%.2f", gene_ao_dist),
                         nrow = nrow(gene_ao_dist), dimnames = dimnames(gene_ao_dist))
  diag(disp_nums_ao) <- ""
}
ao_heatmap_args <- list(
  gene_ao_dist,
  color           = colorRampPalette(c("#4575b4", "#ffffbf", "#d73027"))(100),
  breaks          = seq(min(gene_ao_dist, na.rm = TRUE),
                        max(gene_ao_dist, na.rm = TRUE),
                        length.out = 101),
  na_col          = "grey80",
  cluster_rows    = TRUE,
  cluster_cols    = TRUE,
  # clustering_distance_rows = as.dist(gene_ao_dist_clust),
  # clustering_distance_cols = as.dist(gene_ao_dist_clust),
 # display_numbers = disp_nums_ao,
  #number_color    = "black",
  #fontsize_number = 8,
  fontsize_row    = max(4, 120 / length(top_genes)),
  fontsize_col    = max(4, 120 / length(top_genes)),
  angle_col       = "45",
  main            = sprintf(
    "Gene–Gene Average Overlap Distance — HVG CCIs only (%s)",
    if (GENE_GENE_CANCER_FILTER == "All") "consensus across all datasets"
    else paste0(GENE_GENE_CANCER_FILTER, " datasets only"))
)

do.call(pheatmap, ao_heatmap_args)

gene_ao_heatmap_file <- file.path(OUTPUT_DIR,
  sprintf("gene_gene_ao_heatmap_%s.png", tolower(GENE_GENE_CANCER_FILTER)))
do.call(pheatmap, c(ao_heatmap_args, list(filename = gene_ao_heatmap_file,
                                           width    = 3000 / 300,
                                           height   = 3000 / 300)))
message("AO heatmap saved to ", gene_ao_heatmap_file)

} # end for (GENE_GENE_CANCER_FILTER in c("All", "Breast", "Lung"))
# NOTE: matrix_global_gene_* and gene_cci_* below reflect the last iteration ("Lung").

# ── Expose for inspection ────────────────────────────────────────────────────
# matrix_global_gene_distance          # Gene × Gene Jaccard distance matrix (top-500 lists)
# matrix_global_gene_ao_distance       # Gene × Gene AO distance matrix (full ranked lists)
# list_gene_pairwise_intersections      # tibble: GeneA, GeneB, mutual_ccis (list), n_mutual
# gene_cci_top                          # named list: gene → union CCI character vector (Jaccard)
# gene_cci_consensus_ranked             # named list: gene → consensus ranked CCI vector (AO)
# get_mutual_ccis_genes(gene1, gene2)   # helper: shared CCIs for any two top genes

# Quick-access convenience (uncomment to open in RStudio viewer)
# View(as.data.frame(matrix_global_gene_distance))
# View(list_gene_pairwise_intersections)
# get_mutual_ccis_genes("CTLA4", "CD274")
```
